zh.lifeSummary: 當Simon de Fraser於1070年出生在蘇格蘭皮布萊爾皮布萊斯時，他的父親John de Fraser30歲，母親Euphem Sloan25歲。他於大約1095年與Margaret Alpin of Lochabar在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1132年在蘇格蘭皮布萊爾享年63歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Simon de Fraser于1070年出生在苏格兰皮布萊爾皮布萊斯时，他的父亲John de Fraser30岁，母亲Euphem Sloan25岁。他于大约1095年与Margaret Alpin of Lochabar在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1132年在苏格兰皮布萊爾享年63岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Fraser
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: apparently a nickname from Anglo-Norman French fraser(e), fresere ‘strawberry plant’. Fresel and Frisel, from Anglo-Norman French fresel ‘strawberry’, are early variants of the Fraser surname, the modern Gaelicized form of which is Friseal. See Frizzell . The crest on the Scottish family's coat of arms takes the form of a strawberry plant, but its antiquity is unknown. Claims of a habitational derivation, in particular from a place called la Frézelière in Anjou (France), are attractive but they lack verifiable evidence.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

History: There are two clans Fraser in Scotland, with common ancestry going back to Simon Fraser of Keith in East Lothian, who lived in the 12th century. One of these clans has its seat at Philorth Castle (subsequently re-named Cairnbulg) on the northeast coast of Scotland. Sir Alexander Fraser, 8th laird of Philorth (c. 1536–1623) converted the fishing village of Faithlie into the burgh of Fraserburgh in the 1590s. The other clan is Fraser of Lovat, associated mainly with the city of Inverness are. They are descended from Simon Fraser, a younger son, who lived in the early 14th century. In Gaelic, the head of Clan Fraser of Lovat is known as Mac Shimi ‘son of Simon’.

variants.name: Frashier

variants.name: Fraiser

variants.name: Frizzell
meanings: English and Irish: nickname from Old French fresel, frisel ‘lace, ribbon, braid, brooch, frill, ruff’, for someone with an ornate style of dress, or ‘object of little value’ (a diminutive of frese, of ancient Germanic origin).
Scottish: from Anglo-Norman French fresel ‘strawberry’, an alternative form of Fraser .

variants.name: Frazier
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Fraser  .
Americanized form of French Frégeau (see Fregeau ).

variants.name: Frasher
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Fraser  .
Possibly an altered form of German Fratzscher (see Frutchey ).

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Dev .

variants.name: Deborah
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘bee’ in Hebrew), borne by the nurse of Rebecca (Genesis 35:8) and by a woman judge and prophet (Judges 4–5) who led the Israelites to victory over the Canaanites. It has always been popular as a Jewish name. It was in use among Christians by the mid 16th century and was taken up by the Puritans in the 17th century, in part because the bee was a symbol of industriousness. Since then it has enjoyed enormous popularity, peaking in the 1960s. Among other famous bearers is the actress  Deborah Kerr  (  1921–2007 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Simon de Fraser was born in 1070, in Peebles, Peeblesshire, Scotland, his father, John de Fraser, was 30 and his mother, Euphem Sloan, was 25. He married Margaret Alpin of Lochabar about 1095, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died about 1132, in Peeblesshire, Scotland, at the age of 63, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.Peebles, Peeblesshire, Scotland: Peebles, Valle de Twede, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Simon de Fraser est né en 1070, à Peebles, Valle de Twede, Écosse, son père, John de Fraser, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Euphem Sloan, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Alpin of Lochabar environ 1095, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé environ 1132, à Valle de Twede, Écosse, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Simon de Fraser 1070 in Peebles, Peeblesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Fraser 30 und seine Mutter Euphem Sloan 25. Er hat um 1095 in Scotland Margaret Alpin of Lochabar geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb um 1132 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Peeblesshire, Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Simon de Fraser è nato il nel 1070 nel Peebles, Peeblesshire, Scotland, il suo padre, John de Fraser, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Euphem Sloan, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Alpin of Lochabar circa 1095, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì circa 1132, nel Peeblesshire, Scotland, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Simon de Fraserが1070年にスコットランドペエブレシュアイアペエブレスで生まれた時，父John de Fraserは30歳，母Euphem Sloanは25歳であった。約1095年にスコットランドでMargaret Alpin of Lochabarと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は約1132年にスコットランドペエブレシュアイアで63歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Simon de Fraser(이)가 1070년 스컷랜드 피블레실르 피블레스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Fraser(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Euphem Sloan(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1095년 스컷랜드에서 Margaret Alpin of Lochabar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1132년 스컷랜드 피블레실르에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

mn.Peebles, Peeblesshire, Scotland: Peebles, Tueddal, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Simon de Fraser nasceu em 1070, em Peebles, Peeblesshire, Scotland, seu pai, John de Fraser, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Euphem Sloan, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Alpin of Lochabar aproximadamente 1095, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1132, em Peeblesshire, Scotland, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Simon de Fraser родился в 1070 г. в местности пиблесь, пиблессхир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени John de Fraser было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Euphem Sloan, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Alpin of Lochabar около 1095 г. в местности Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер около 1132 г. в местности пиблессхир, Шотландия в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Simon de Fraser nació en 1070, en Peebles, Peeblesshire, Scotland, su papá, John de Fraser, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Euphem Sloan, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Margaret Alpin of Lochabar aproximadamente 1095, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió aproximadamente 1132, en Peeblesshire, Scotland, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
